cases.prompt: Next.js 앱 Vercel에 배포 설정하고 GitHub Actions CI/CD도 만들어줘.

assertions.text: Selects Vercel for the Next.js/SSR app per the platform decision tree
Produces a .github/workflows deploy.yml with a test job (lint/typecheck/test) and a main-only deploy job
Configures automatic preview deploy on PR and production deploy on main push

cases.prompt: Set up deployment for my API on Cloudflare Workers with environment variables and error monitoring.

assertions.text: Targets Cloudflare Workers (serverless) for the API per the platform tree
Manages env vars via platform UI / GitHub Secrets and keeps .env in .gitignore (no hardcoded secrets)
Wires Sentry (or equivalent) for runtime error tracking
